Added_Other.name: DFFlagDataStoreEnableModernRequestCounters_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Enables modern tracking of data requests with filters for specific game universes.
Added_Other.purpose: Improves data management for developers, leading to better game performance and reliability.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreOrderedListFixedRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Sets a fixed limit on requests to ordered data stores with a filter for universes.
Added_Other.purpose: Improves performance and reliability when accessing ordered lists of data in games.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreOrderedListPerPlayerRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Imposes a request limit for each player accessing ordered data stores with a universe filter.
Added_Other.purpose: Ensures fair access to data for all players, preventing any single player from overloading the system.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreOrderedReadFixedRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Sets a limit on how many requests can be made to read data in a specific order.
Added_Other.purpose: Enhances the efficiency of data retrieval for games, leading to faster load times.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreOrderedReadPerPlayerRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Sets a limit on the number of ordered data reads a player can make within a specific universe.
Added_Other.purpose: Ensures fair access to data for all players, preventing any single player from monopolizing resources.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreOrderedRemoveFixedRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Adjusts the limit on how many requests can be made to remove data.
Added_Other.purpose: Enhances performance by allowing more efficient data management.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreOrderedRemovePerPlayerRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Limits the number of ordered removal requests from data stores per player.
Added_Other.purpose: Enhances game stability by controlling how many data changes a player can make at once.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreOrderedWriteFixedRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Adjusts the limits on how many data store requests can be made in a specific universe.
Added_Other.purpose: Ensures smoother data handling for games, reducing errors when saving player data.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreOrderedWritePerPlayerRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Sets a limit on the number of data store writes per player based on universe filtering.
Added_Other.purpose: Enhances data management efficiency and prevents overload for smoother gameplay.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreStandardListFixedRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Adjusts the request limits for data storage operations based on universe filtering.
Added_Other.purpose: Enhances data management efficiency for games, ensuring smoother gameplay and data access.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreStandardListPerPlayerRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Sets a limit on the number of data store requests per player for specific universes.
Added_Other.purpose: Improves game performance by preventing excessive data requests from a single player.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreStandardReadFixedRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Sets a fixed limit on the number of read requests to data stores for a universe.
Added_Other.purpose: Improves reliability of data retrieval for players, minimizing delays in loading their game data.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreStandardReadPerPlayerRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Sets a limit on the number of data store read requests per player.
Added_Other.purpose: Prevents abuse and ensures fair usage of data resources for all players.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreStandardRemoveFixedRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Adjusts the request limit for data stores based on universe filtering.
Added_Other.purpose: Allows more flexible data management for developers across different game universes.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreStandardRemovePerPlayerRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Adjusts the limit on how many data store removal requests a player can make, filtered by universe.
Added_Other.purpose: Allows players to manage their data more effectively without hitting restrictive limits.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreStandardWriteFixedRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Imposes a limit on the number of data write requests per universe.
Added_Other.purpose: Ensures fair usage of data storage, preventing any single game from overwhelming the system.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreStandardWritePerPlayerRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Imposes a limit on the number of data store writes per player based on universe filtering.
Added_Other.purpose: Ensures fair usage of data storage, preventing any single player from overwhelming the system.

Added_Other.name: FFlagAppLifecycleStateManagerUsesRuntime

Added_Other.purpose: Improves the stability and responsiveness of the app during state changes.

Added_Other.name: FFlagContentProviderPreloadContentBlockingUsesRuntime
Added_Other.mechanism: Preloads game content while blocking other processes during runtime.
Added_Other.purpose: Reduces loading times and improves the player's experience by ensuring content is ready when needed.

Added_Other.name: FFlagDataModelPatchConfigurerIsLoadingUsesRuntime
Added_Other.mechanism: Enables the data model to load patches during runtime instead of preloading.
Added_Other.purpose: Improves the game's performance by allowing dynamic updates without needing a full reload.

Added_Other.name: FFlagSessionizedEventIngestUsesRuntime
Added_Other.mechanism: Uses runtime data to track player events more efficiently.
Added_Other.purpose: Improves the accuracy of player activity tracking for better game insights.

Added_Other.name: FFlagSignalRCoreHubConnectionUsesRuntime
Added_Other.mechanism: Utilizes a runtime connection for SignalR hubs.
Added_Other.purpose: Improves real-time communication in games, making multiplayer experiences smoother.
